text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hmm? What's that gesture mean? You cold?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Wait, got it! Hot springs! You wanna try a
Japanese-style bath, yeah?!

text_block_list.name: Foreigner
text_block_list.text: [Foreign Language]

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a busy street, I catch sight of Tamamo Cross
and Oguri Cap attempting to communicate with a
tourist from overseas.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No dice... I can't understand a thing, 'sides that
he's stressed out.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
He looks to be in a hurry. Do you think it's
something urgent?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Rather, don'tcha think he's gettin' kinda pale?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rumble...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's it! He's hungry!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Nah! He's lookin' for the toilet!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Which makes this an emergency! Hey, you
there—come help out!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon, mister! Follow me!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: The closest toilet is over at the park!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Comin' through! Thanks for yer cooperation!

text_block_list.name: Foreigner
text_block_list.text: [Foreign Language]

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! He left lookin' a lot happier, huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
He must have been thanking us. It's a good thing
we avoided disaster.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm surprised you recognized he needed the
toilet.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I was as lost as you were at the start, but when his
tummy rumbled and he went pale, it clicked!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Plus, since I've always got you around, I know
what "hungry" looks like—and that wasn't it!
choice_data_list: You never hesitate to help others, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Plus, since I've always got you around, I know
what "hungry" looks like—an' he wasn't it!
choice_data_list: You never hesitate to help others, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C-c'mon! I'm just tryin' to get on the director's
good side!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're getting embarrassed.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oguri! You promised to stop pointin' that out!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmm? I don't remember making that promise.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You promise promised!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ah, whatever. Nothin' wrong with bein' friendly,
yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And if language gets in the way, I'll use vibes!
That's just how I roll!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Th-thanks! Y'know, it's kinda embarrassin' to be
told so straight!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're right, she's very kind. She never hesitates
to recommend the best places for Kansai cuisine
or even just spots where you can eat til you drop!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Why're your examples all 'bout food?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That you, Oguri? Gettin' hungry, huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
All this talk about food makes me want to go to
one of those eat-till-you-drop places again...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Then let's grab a bite! Lunch never tastes better
than it does after doin' a good deed!
